title: Conduct an internal audit of the quality system
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct an internal audit of the quality system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for internal audit

pcs.text: Identify the components and elements of the quality system and work area to be audited
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the components and elements of the quality system and work area to be audited?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the components and elements of the quality system and work area to be audited.

pcs.text: Identify documentation requiring collection and review
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify documentation requiring collection and review?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify documentation requiring collection and review.

pcs.text: Brief relevant personnel and allocate roles and responsibilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Brief relevant personnel and allocate roles and responsibilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Brief relevant personnel and allocate roles and responsibilities.

pcs.text: Prepare and/or gather audit documentation in consultation with relevant personnel ensuring any previous non-conformances are included in checklists
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and/or gather audit documentation in consultation with relevant personnel ensuring any previous non-conformances are included in checklists?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and/or gather audit documentation in consultation with relevant personnel ensuring any previous non-conformances are included in checklists.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for internal audit

elements.title: Conduct audit

pcs.text: Collaborate with relevant personnel to maximise continuous improvement and ownership of the audit process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collaborate with relevant personnel to maximise continuous improvement and ownership of the audit process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collaborate with relevant personnel to maximise continuous improvement and ownership of the audit process.

pcs.text: Review areas of past non-conformance for compliance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review areas of past non-conformance for compliance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review areas of past non-conformance for compliance.

pcs.text: Collect sufficient evidence to identify non-conforming aspects of the quality system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect sufficient evidence to identify non-conforming aspects of the quality system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect sufficient evidence to identify non-conforming aspects of the quality system.

pcs.text: Analyse evidence and identify suitable corrective actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse evidence and identify suitable corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse evidence and identify suitable corrective actions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct audit

elements.title: Report findings

pcs.text: Document findings from the audit process in the required format
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document findings from the audit process in the required format?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document findings from the audit process in the required format.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present recommendations for corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present recommendations for corrective actions.

pcs.text: Suggest strategies for the implementation of the corrective actions that respond to non-conformances
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Suggest strategies for the implementation of the corrective actions that respond to non-conformances?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Suggest strategies for the implementation of the corrective actions that respond to non-conformances.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Report findings

elements.title: Complete corrective actions

pcs.text: Develop and implement a plan that clearly outlines actions required to improve the quality system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement a plan that clearly outlines actions required to improve the quality system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement a plan that clearly outlines actions required to improve the quality system.

pcs.text: Consult with relevant personnel regarding the necessary strategies and timeframes to improve the quality system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with relevant personnel regarding the necessary strategies and timeframes to improve the quality system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with relevant personnel regarding the necessary strategies and timeframes to improve the quality system.

pcs.text: Evaluate and report the effectiveness of the corrective action after an agreed time interval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate and report the effectiveness of the corrective action after an agreed time interval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate and report the effectiveness of the corrective action after an agreed time interval.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete corrective actions
